metadata.name: Schedule Annual Fire Alarm System Test

description: The PM needs to schedule the legally required annual fire alarm system test for a commercial building.

nodes.task_description: Contact the certified fire safety vendor to schedule a date for the inspection and test.

expected_outcome.value: An appointment is scheduled with 'SafeGuard Fire Co.' for the test.

nodes.task_description: Send a notice to all building tenants informing them of the date and time of the alarm test.

expected_outcome.value: A building-wide notice is sent out at least 48 hours in advance.

nodes.task_description: After the test, obtain the certificate of compliance from the vendor and save it to the property's file.

expected_outcome.value: The compliance certificate is received and filed correctly.
